docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,711.00 FILED BY ZHANG, HUI QIN AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, HUI QIN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, HUI QIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU $820.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $820.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR HUI QIN ZHANG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT ANH VU NGUYEN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # A5625C17D004, TAG # 038238 BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-17-2025 SERVICE FEE: $80.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU
ORDER FOR DISCHARGE OF ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2025 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO OCT-03-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HUI QIN ZHANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANH VU NGUYEN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF RECEIVED COPIES OF DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS IN COURT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-13-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE . APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HUI QIN ZHANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANH VU NGUYEN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-2025 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2025 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-26-2026 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. COURT UNAVAILABLE DURING CIVIC CENTER POWER OUTAGE. NO APPEARANCES. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH VU
